description: Style NoteThis casual shirt from wills lifestyle give you a charming and carefree look. You can pair it with soft cotton trousers or capris for the perfect, relaxed, day out look.   Product DetailsPink shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket with stitched detail on either side, short puffed sleeves and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care100% linenMachine wash coldDo not bleachLine dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
